name: loomcycle
description: Drive a loomcycle agentic runtime from inside Claude Code — spawn/cancel/list runs, snapshot, evaluate, inspect memory, mint multi-tenant operator tokens, and import .claude/ repos, all via slash commands and skills over loomcycle's bundled MCP server.

bin_path.title: loomcycle binary path
bin_path.description: Path to the loomcycle binary. Leave as 'loomcycle' to use PATH lookup.

config_path.title: loomcycle.yaml path (legacy)
config_path.description: Reserved. The plugin runs as a thin client (--upstream) and no longer loads a config itself — the running runtime owns the config. Kept for compatibility / embedded fallback.

auth_token.title: loomcycle bearer token
auth_token.description: Bearer for loomcycle's /v1/* endpoints, sent by the thin client to the upstream runtime (as LOOMCYCLE_MCP_UPSTREAM_TOKEN). Its principal governs what the plugin can do (an admin token → full authority; a scoped lct_… token → confined). Stored in your OS keychain, never in the repo.

base_url.title: loomcycle base URL (upstream runtime)
base_url.description: Base URL of the running loomcycle runtime the plugin proxies to (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:8787). REQUIRED — the plugin is a thin client and boots no runtime of its own; a loomcycle instance must be reachable here.
